notes: The yearning of ancient Israel was to Jerusalem. During their captivity, the soul of the people was expressed in the 137th Psalm: (William Grant Bangerter, in Conference Report, Apr. 1985, 80; or Ensign, May 1985, 64)
This psalm was probably composed in Chaldea, during the captivity

quotes.text: Psalm 137 This psalm was probably composed in Chaldea, during the captivity The yearning of ancient Israel was to Jerusalem. During their captivity, the soul of the people was expressed in the 137th Psalm:
